high_fidelity_structure.viewport: 390×844 mobile portrait; dense white commerce home feed with a pale blush status/header background and a fixed white bottom navigation.

geometry.header_tabs: about 54px tall, left-aligned text tabs; selected tab is orange with a short orange underline
geometry.search: full-width inset 10px, 42px tall pill/rounded rectangle; scan icon left, camera icon near right, orange search button occupying the right fifth
geometry.quick_grid: 10 circular or simple illustrated icons in 5 columns, two 92px-ish rows with labels below
geometry.promo_cards: three cards in one row with 8px gaps, each roughly 31% width and 150px tall
geometry.coupon_banner: red rounded rectangle, nearly full width, 56px tall; white announcement area and a pale claim button on the right
geometry.feed: two columns separated by 8px; image-first cards with rounded image tops and text/price metadata below
geometry.bottom_nav: fixed 78px bar; five evenly distributed icons and labels, first item active with a large orange circular mark

dominant_colour_blocks: #FFF2F0 pale pink header and promotional card ground
#FF4A0A / #FF5B18 saturated orange for selected controls and search
#FF2115 bright red for coupon banner and price accents
high_fidelity_structure.visual_density: high; compact Chinese-style retail discovery layout with minimal empty space, strong orange/red conversion accents, bold labels, and colorful iconography.
high_fidelity_structure.bottom_navigation_state: visible and fixed; Discover tab is active, Cart tab carries an orange 3-count badge; no modal or drawer is open.

replaced_source_assets.image_strategy: Use local CSS/SVG-style fictional illustrations only; do not reuse screenshot imagery, logos, retailer marks, packaging, or portraits.

fictional_promo_assets.title: 全能操控器
fictional_promo_assets.visual: charcoal gamepad silhouette with colored buttons

fictional_recommendation_assets.title: 磁吸像素充电坞
fictional_recommendation_assets.visual: dark modular desktop robot dock illustration

fictional_recommendation_assets.title: 弧面音乐镜
fictional_recommendation_assets.visual: minimal ivory smart mirror with abstract album art

replaced_source_assets.source_text_replacement_policy: All original marketplace names, service labels, campaign language, product names, prices, avatars, notifications, and user data are replaced with the fictional labels and values in this spec.

components.name: AppShell
components.role: root mobile layout with fixed navigation and scrollable content

components.name: TopTabs
components.interaction: changes feed theme and active underline

components.name: SearchBar
components.interaction: submits query and visibly filters/relabels recommendation cards

components.name: QuickServiceGrid
components.items: fictional service tiles listed in visible_state.quick_services

components.name: CouponBanner
components.copy: 盛夏灵感周 · 低至 8 折

components.name: ProductAction
components.role: small add button on each recommendation card; may be plus icon rather than source-derived wording

components.name: QaResult
components.role: visually hidden or compact in-app test status region populated after interaction checks

inferred_interactions.trigger: Tap a top tab such as 穿搭
inferred_interactions.visible_result: active underline moves to the tapped tab and the recommendation titles/images switch to a matching fictional collection.

inferred_interactions.trigger: Enter or submit a different search query
inferred_interactions.visible_result: recommendation list updates to matching fictional cards; a small result-count or query label becomes visible.
banner changes from “领 ¥12” to “已领取”, with a confirmation toast or inline checkmark.
cart-count increments immediately and a brief “已加入购物袋” confirmation appears.

inferred_interactions.trigger: Tap 购物袋 in bottom navigation
inferred_interactions.visible_result: cart tab becomes active and displays the current fictional cart summary locally.
